creator: isabell121@gmail.com
text:
I've been reading the French version of the fdp-primer document and have noticed some typos (in http://www.freebsd.org/doc/fr_FR.ISO8859-1/books/fdp-primer/x1276.html#AEN1301).  I thought I'd take the opportunity to submit a PR with a fix for them.  :-)

Fix: See attached diff.txt.

Patch attached with submission follows:
